# stack — command reference

<!-- Generated by `go generate ./...` (tools/docgen). Do not edit by hand. -->

Client-side stacked PRs.

- [`stack adopt`](#adopt)
- [`stack remove`](#remove)
- [`stack reparent`](#reparent)
- [`stack start`](#start)
- [`stack submit`](#submit)
- [`stack sync`](#sync)

## adopt

Reconstruct a teammate's stack from a PR's embedded state

```
stack adopt <pr-number> [flags]
```

| Flag | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--owner` | — | forge repo owner/org |
| `--remote` | `origin` | git remote to fetch from |
| `--repo` | — | forge repo name |

## remove

Untrack a branch (grafting children onto its parent); optionally close its PR

```
stack remove <branch> [flags]
```

| Flag | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--close-pr` | `false` | also close the branch's PR |
| `--delete-branch` | `false` | also delete the local and remote git branch |
| `--owner` | — | forge repo owner/org (for --close-pr / nav refresh) |
| `--remote` | `origin` | git remote (for --delete-branch) |
| `--repo` | — | forge repo name (for --close-pr / nav refresh) |
| `--trunk` | `main` | trunk branch the stack roots onto |

## reparent

Move a branch onto a different parent and rebase it

```
stack reparent <branch> --onto <new-parent> [flags]
```

| Flag | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--onto` | — | the new parent branch |
| `--trunk` | `main` | trunk branch the stack roots onto |

## start

Create a branch on top of the current branch and track it in the stack

```
stack start <name> [flags]
```

| Flag | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--parent` | — | parent branch (defaults to current branch) |
| `--trunk` | `main` | trunk branch the stack roots onto |

## submit

Push the stack, open/refresh PRs, and publish state into each PR

```
stack submit [flags]
```

| Flag | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--draft` | `false` | open new PRs as drafts |
| `--owner` | — | forge repo owner/org |
| `--remote` | `origin` | git remote to push to |
| `--repo` | — | forge repo name |
| `--trunk` | `main` | trunk branch the stack roots onto |
| `--update-titles` | `false` | reset each existing PR's title to its branch's first commit subject |

## sync

Cascade-rebase every branch onto its updated parent

```
stack sync [flags]
```

| Flag | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--trunk` | `main` | trunk branch the stack roots onto |
